<h2>Changes</h2>
<h2>🐛 Bug Fixes</h2>
<ul>
<li>fix(autodiscovery/kubernetes): handle empty yaml <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/olblak/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/olblak">@olblak</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4479309995" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8943" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8943/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8943">#8943</a>)</li>
<li>fix(dockerdigest): include HideTag in ReportConfig to prevent source cache collision <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/max-chaban/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/max-chaban">@max-chaban</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4471216217" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8927" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8927/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8927">#8927</a>)</li>
<li>fix: sanitize version when checking the latest Updatecli version available <a class="user-mention notranslate" data-hovercard-type="user" data-hovercard-url="/users/olblak/hovercard" data-octo-click="hovercard-link-click" data-octo-dimensions="link_type:self" href="https://github.com/olblak">@olblak</a> (<a class="issue-link js-issue-link" data-error-text="Failed to load title" data-id="4459674627" data-permission-text="Title is private" data-url="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/issues/8824" data-hovercard-type="pull_request" data-hovercard-url="/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8824/hovercard" href="https://github.com/updatecli/updatecli/pull/8824">#8824</a>)</li>
</ul>
